planningNote: Planned test locations marked TBD are handoff targets and do not claim files already exist. Concrete paths must be selected by implementation/test owners after the shared-mobile runtime is chosen.

scopes.scopeName: Shared Schema, Mobile Foundation, Auth, And Fail-Loud Config

tests.file: TBD: clients/mobile/assistant shared schema generation test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: incompatible schema change fails shared mobile codegen for iPhone/iOS and Android

tests.file: TBD: web/pwa generated assistant schema test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: web generated validator rejects incompatible schema drift

tests.file: TBD: shared assistant renderer fixture canary
tests.rendererDescriptorSchema: render-descriptor-v1 (see specs/073-web-mobile-assistant-frontend/design.md § Render-Descriptor JSON Schema; closed kind vocabulary: text|quote|action|citation; flat ordered array of typed nodes)
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: web, shared-mobile core, iOS adapter, and Android adapter each emit a render descriptor conforming to render-descriptor-v1 and deep-equal the per-fixture golden descriptor (<name>.input.json + <name>.descriptor.json under tests/fixtures/assistant_response_v1/)
tests.notes: Resolves 073-IMPL-BLOCK-2: canonical render-descriptor JSON schema and shared fixture path are now ratified by design.md so the cross-language canary has one wire-level expectation across web, mobile core, iOS adapter, and Android adapter.

tests.file: TBD: clients/mobile/assistant platform declaration test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: shared mobile build declares both ios and android targets from one codebase

tests.file: TBD: assistant HTTP transport hint integration test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: web and mobile transport hints are accepted and telemetry-only for web, iPhone/iOS, and Android clients

tests.file: TBD: web and shared mobile sensitive storage guard tests
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: no web or shared mobile renderer/core path persists bearer/session material

tests.file: TBD: web and mobile client config fail-loud tests
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: missing backend URL/schema/platform/auth config fails without fallback defaults

tests.file: TBD: live assistant transport hint e2e test
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: live web/mobile hints do not alter server response shape

tests.file: tests/e2e/assistant/web_pwa_chat_e2e_test.go (planned) + web/pwa/tests/assistant_chat.spec.ts (stub)
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: Go e2e drives served PWA assistant route, posts authenticated turn, asserts response body/sources/controls render per schema fixture
tests.notes: Reclassified from e2e-ui to Go-driven e2e-api: repo CLI today wires only Go-based e2e and no browser-driver runner exists; companion .spec.ts is a documentation stub following the photos_pwa_test.go pattern. Driver-based browser validation deferred to a future foundation spec.

tests.file: tests/e2e/assistant/web_pwa_retry_e2e_test.go (planned) + web/pwa/tests/assistant_retry.spec.ts (stub)
tests.plannedTitle: Planned regression: web timeout retry reuses the same transport_message_id (server observes one deduped turn); adversarial sub-test fails if retry mints a fresh id
tests.notes: Reclassified from e2e-ui to Go-driven e2e-api per design.md Alternatives decision.

tests.file: tests/e2e/assistant/web_pwa_accessibility_e2e_test.go (planned) + web/pwa/tests/assistant_accessibility.spec.ts (stub)
tests.plannedTitle: Planned: served PWA markup contains aria-live/role=status response region, labelled composer, and deterministic tab/focus order across composer, send, disambig, confirm, retry controls (DOM + tabindex analysis)
tests.notes: Reclassified from e2e-ui to Go-driven e2e-api: validates static HTML/ARIA invariants the renderer must emit. Driver-based screen-reader announcement validation deferred to future browser-driver foundation spec.
